preferred_sources: Official Boom Beach game data and patch notes
troops.notes: Verify maxLevel, researchCost, trainingCost, attackSpeed, and any troop-specific mechanics together.

preferred_sources: Official Boom Beach game data and patch notes
defences.notes: Verify damage, health, range, reload time, and HQ unlock data in the same pass.

preferred_sources: Official Boom Beach game data and patch notes
Boom Beach Wiki gunboat ability pages
gunboatAbilities.notes: Track normal and temporary gunboat abilities separately, and prefer the page statistics tables over summary text when the wiki shows conflicting energy cost wording.

preferred_sources: Boom Beach Wiki prototype troop pages
prototypeTroops.notes: Prototype entries tend to need extra notes for temporary availability and special mechanics. As of April 1, 2026 the current workshop roster differs from the bot's older 12-26 legacy dataset; check docs/prototype-troop-analysis.md before editing live values.

preferred_sources: Boom Beach Wiki prototype defence pages
prototypeDefences.notes: Keep prototype behaviour notes close to the level data so rare mechanics are easier to verify later.

dictionary.notes: Terminology, pronunciation, and origin should be checked together to keep the dictionary and IPA commands aligned.
